description: Implement WorkspaceScopeEnforcer detect-only in src/Guardrails.Core/Execution/WorkspaceScopeEnforcer.cs (snapshot + post-action content-hash diff, enforcementIgnore), wire the detect seam into TaskExecutor.RunAttemptAsync to FAIL on out-of-scope writes, add enforcementIgnore to RunConfig — so the M4 tests pass
